loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC-1A aggregate readings from 6 active outgoing feeders (UPS/BPDB); 2 UPS feeders and 2 solar incomers are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution across active feeders; HHF Reactive feeders have no data (has_data=N); Solar Incomers and Transformer incomers are dark (has_data=N). Load % is omitted because rated_kva is unknown for these UPS/BPDB members.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — contract capacity is unknown for this asset, so the 'Consumed %' and 'Peak Today' KPIs are omitted.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active power (kW) and true power factor (kpi_true_pf) aggregated from the panel's 6 live outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage, current unbalance, and total current for the 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.
